dragToMoveAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the drag handle on a translation item
dragToMoveAriaLabel.fr-ca: Faites glisser pour déplacer la traduction
dragToMoveAriaLabel.ja: ドラッグして翻訳を移動

copyKeyAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the copy key button on a translation item header

hideCommentAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the comment toggle button when comment is currently shown
hideCommentAriaLabel.ja: コメントを非表示にする

showCommentAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the comment toggle button when comment is currently hidden

moreActionsAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the more actions menu trigger button on a translation item

editAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the Edit menu item in the translation item actions menu

translateAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the Translate menu item in the translation item actions menu

deleteAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the Delete menu item in the translation item actions menu

noStatuses.comment: Screen-reader text shown in status breakdown when no translation statuses are available
